Skill Level: Expert – Hands-on ESRI professional with strong implementation and migration experience.

· Installation, configuration, and administration of ArcGIS Enterprise 11.x

· Troubleshoot configuration, publishing, and integration issues.

· Support monitoring configuration, performance tuning, and production readiness.

- Revenue Secretary: Turn hunts, offers, and delivery lanes into booked revenue. Next move: Package new offers and prioritize the strongest commercial lanes.
- Hiring Secretary: Convert demand into roles, candidate slates, and interview motion. Next move: Run Praapti on the most urgent revenue-critical role.
- Delivery Secretary: Keep work moving from plan to execution without losing context. Next move: Bind active missions to owners, outputs, and follow-up dates.
- Protection Secretary: Guard the core, risk posture, privacy controls, and system continuity. Next move: Preserve core memory and keep the command layer stable under load.
- Accounts Secretary: Maintain the regional tax profile, guide bookkeeping, and keep revenue and compliance signals clean. Next move: 19 profile(s), 2 ledger entries, and 5 report(s) are feeding the revenue core.
Core order: protect the core, accelerate delivery, and convert intelligence into revenue.
